LLM MODELS: Ministral/Chronos/Qwen contributing minimal alpha. LLM BTC 1h is best at 54.6% but calibration gap of 0.45 means confidence values are meaningless.

LAYER 2 PATTERN: 20 invocations today, most producing HOLD. 3 timed out before writing journal. System is overtriggered in ranging markets — triggers fire on sentiment flips that lack persistence.
